# BEGIN LSCACHE
# END LSCACHE
# BEGIN NON_LSCACHE
# END NON_LSCACHE
######### Generated by Lwspanel #########
######### Ne pas modifier / Don't touch #########

# Redirections https obrille.com
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTP:X-Forwarded-Proto} !https
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} !on
RewriteCond %{HTTP_HOST} ^(?:www\.)?obrille\.com(?:.*)$ [nc]
RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [redirect=301,L]

######### End Generated by Lwspanel #########

# === BEGIN HTTPS Force coachingexpertci.com (custom) ===
# LWSpanel ne genere la redirection HTTPS que pour obrille.com.
# Cette regle ajoute le meme comportement pour coachingexpertci.com,
# ce qui evite l'avertissement "Connexion non securisee" dans Facebook in-app browser.
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTP:X-Forwarded-Proto} !https
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} !on
RewriteCond %{HTTP_HOST} ^(?:www\.)?coachingexpertci\.com(?:.*)$ [nc]
RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
</IfModule>

# HSTS : annonce aux navigateurs que ce site est HTTPS-only pendant 1 an.
# Empeche aussi Facebook in-app browser de charger des ressources en HTTP.
<IfModule mod_headers.c>
Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
</IfModule>
# === END HTTPS Force coachingexpertci.com ===

# === BEGIN React Landings ===
# Sert le SPA React pour les 7 produits, prioritaire sur WordPress.
# IMPORTANT : Ne PAS toucher manuellement (manipule par script de deploiement).
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
RewriteEngine On
# Si le fichier existe physiquement (ex: /poudre-pousse-cheveux/hero.webp), on le sert direct.
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
RewriteRule ^(boutique|creme-anti-verrue|creme-verrue-tk|creme-verrue-tk2|spraydouleurtk|spraylipome|spraylipometk|creme-anti-lipome|creme-anti-lipome-tk|chaussette-homme|creme-anti-lipome-tk|chaussette-homme|chaussette-premium-homme|creme-anti-cerne|serum-cerne|serum-cerne-tk|serum-cerne-paye|creme-ongle-incarne|creme-ongle-incarne-v2|chaussette-compression|chaussette-compression-v2|chaussette|detoxminceur|bande-sport-minceur|patch-minceur-glp|lunette-de-nuit|patchdouleurtk|patchdouleurfb|crememinceurfb|coffret-boxer-homme|coffret-boxer-luxe-v3|chapeau-dame|poudre-pousse-cheveux|spray-vitiligo|chapeau-gavroche)(/.*)?$ /landings-app/index.html [L]
</IfModule>
# === END React Landings ===


# BEGIN WP MANAGER
RewriteRule ^author/(.+) "-" [F]
<If "%{REQUEST_FILENAME} =~ /wp-comments-post.php/ && ( %{HTTP_USER_AGENT} == '' || %{HTTP_REFERER} == '' )">
	RewriteRule wp-comments-post\.php$ "-" [F]
</If>
RewriteRule (.+)\.sql$ "-" [F]
RewriteRule (license\.txt|readme\.html)$ "-" [F]
RewriteRule xmlrpc\.php$ "-" [F]
<If "%{REQUEST_URI} =~ m#wp-content/uploads/.+\.php(\d+)?#">
	SetHandler !
</If>
# END WP MANAGER


# BEGIN WordPress
<IfModule mod_rewrite.c>
RewriteEngine On
RewriteRule .* - [E=HTTP_AUTHORIZATION:%{HTTP:Authorization}]
RewriteBase /
RewriteRule ^index\.php$ - [L]
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d
RewriteRule . /index.php [L]
</IfModule>
# END WordPress
